content:
FINAL IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER AUDIT — CHAT MODULE END TO END

Audit whether IVX IA is truly complete and operational as a senior developer inside the live chat module.

Do not give me a general status summary. Run the real production tests now and mark every item PASS, FAIL, or UNVERIFIED.

AUDIT SCOPE

1. CHAT ACCESS
- Owner chat opens without crash
- Correct owner identity loads
- Owner-only access is enforced
- Unauthorized users are rejected correctly
- No blank screen, frozen state, or infinite loading

2. MESSAGE DELIVERY
- User message sends successfully
- Assistant response returns successfully
- No duplicate messages
- No missing messages
- No out-of-order messages
- Timestamps are correct
- Delivered status is accurate
- Message IDs are stable

3. AI PROVIDER
- Active provider identified
- Active model identified
- AI Gateway authentication verified
- Provider request returns HTTP 200
- No raw 401, 403, stack trace, or gateway error appears in the UI
- Provider fallback is tested
- Provider failure returns a safe user-facing message

4. PERSISTENCE
Perform this exact test:
- Send message
- Capture conversationId
- Capture userMessageId
- Capture assistantMessageId
- Close app
- Reopen app
- Confirm all three IDs remain
- Restart backend service
- Reopen chat
- Confirm conversation still remains

5. REALTIME AND SYNC
- Realtime subscription works
- Polling fallback works
- Multi-device sync works
- Android receives messages
- iOS receives messages
- Web receives messages
- Reconnect after internet loss works
- Offline queued messages send after reconnect

6. CHAT UI
- Keyboard does not cover composer
- Composer expands correctly
- Send button works
- Scroll-to-latest button works
- Search conversation works
- Pull-to-refresh works
- Typing/working indicator works
- Long messages render correctly
- Error messages are sanitized
- No jumping, flickering, or layout shift

7. FILE AND MEDIA SUPPORT
Test actual uploads:
- Images
- Videos
- PDF
- Document attachment
- Multiple files
- Inline previews
- Upload progress
- Failed upload recovery
- File persistence after app restart

8. SENIOR DEVELOPER CAPABILITY
Verify IVX IA can:
- Read repository files
- Identify exact file and line causing an issue
- Edit code
- Run tests
- Run build
- Fix build errors
- Commit changes
- Push to GitHub
- Trigger Render deployment
- Read deployment status
- Read production logs
- Verify production endpoint
- Roll back a bad deployment
- Provide commit SHA and deployment ID
- Refuse to claim success without evidence

9. SECURITY
- Secrets remain server-side
- No API key is exposed in the mobile bundle
- No secret appears in logs
- Owner authorization is checked server-side
- Dangerous operations require owner authorization
- Rate limiting is active
- Prompt injection protections are active
- File uploads are validated

10. PRODUCTION VERIFICATION
Run live tests against production:
- GET /health = HTTP 200
- Owner chat endpoint = HTTP 200
- AI provider response = HTTP 200
- Supabase read/write = PASS
- Realtime subscription = PASS
- GitHub HEAD identified
- Render live commit identified
- GitHub commit matches live deployment
- Production chat screenshot captured

11. HONESTY AUDIT
Confirm IVX IA does not:
- invent deployment IDs
- invent commit SHAs
- claim access it does not have
- say “verified” without a live test
- hide blockers
- request credentials before testing existing bindings
- expose raw internal errors to the owner UI

REQUIRED FINAL REPORT

Provide a numbered table from 1 to 60 with:

- Item
- Status: PASS / FAIL / UNVERIFIED
- Exact evidence
- File or endpoint tested
- Required fix if failed

Then provide:

A. GitHub repository
B. Branch
C. GitHub HEAD SHA
D. Live Render commit SHA
E. Render deployment ID
F. Production URL
G. /health result
H. Active AI provider
I. Active AI model
J. AI request HTTP status
K. Supabase status
L. Conversation persistence evidence
M. Multi-device sync evidence
N. Screenshot of working production chat
O. Files changed
P. Tests executed
Q. Remaining blockers
R. Final percentage complete

FINAL STATUS MUST BE EXACTLY ONE:

IVX_IA_CHAT_SENIOR_DEVELOPER_VERIFIED_COMPLETE

or

IVX_IA_CHAT_NOT_COMPLETE

Do not say complete unless all critical production tests pass with live evidence.
Fix every failure you can, deploy the fixes, rerun the audit, and only then provide the final status.
